endpoints.finding: the official SWE-bench Docker image provides the pinned Python 3.9 environment the native harness could not; the real hidden test fails on base and passes on gold, so the Docker harness runs the environment-fidelity-blocked instance end to end
endpoints.native_harness_status: blocked: Python 3.11 lacks collections.Mapping; this instance cannot run natively
endpoints.scope: one natively-blocked instance; full-dataset Docker coverage is engineering, not open research
